query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deletion_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  requested_by INT NOT NULL,
  requested_by_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  dr_scope ENUM('all', 'contacts', 'companies') NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  dr_status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  approved_by INT,
  approved_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  admin_note TEXT,
  estimated_record_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  actual_deleted_count INT,
  requested_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  resolved_at BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_dr_tenant (tenant_company_id),
  INDEX idx_dr_status (dr_status),
  INDEX idx_dr_requested_by (requested_by)
);

  dr_status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  approved_by INT,
  approved_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  admin_note TEXT,
  estimated_record_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  actual_deleted_count INT,
  requested_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  resolved_at BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_dr_tenant (tenant_company_id),
  INDEX idx_dr_status (dr_status),
  INDEX idx_dr_requested_by (requested_by)
);
